title: Hiring Production Engineer at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Industries Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Industries Advisory Limited:
Finolex Industries Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries Advisory Limited!
